name: Peanut Butter-Pineapple-Banana Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread peanut butter on half of the vanilla wafers.
2. Place remaining wafers on top of the peanut butter layer.
3. Arrange in the bottom of a 1-quart baking dish.
4. Top with banana slices and crushed pineapple.
5. In a medium saucepan, combine sugar, flour, and salt.
6. Gradually whisk in milk and egg substitute.
7. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
8. Reduce heat and simmer, whisking constantly for 3 minutes.
9. Stir in vanilla extract.
10. Spoon the mixture over the fruit.
11. Cover and chill at least 2 hours.
Serving size: 1/2 cup
Calories per serving: 193
Fat per serving: 3.6g
